entries.value:
<color={t:damageColor}>All your health points were spent!</color>

Remember to use food and potions to restore your HP the next time.

Press ENTER to restart.
Good morning! I'm willing to sell items from my inventory for a <color={t:infoColor}>{0}</color> of their value and buy items from your inventory at a <color={t:infoColor}>{1}</color> of their value.
Sells at full value. Can only be sold.

A sweet and yummy cookie.
Restores <color={t:HPColor}>{0} HP</color>.

A delicious slice of pizza.
Restores <color={t:HPColor}>{0} HP</color>.

A mysterious potion.
Restores  <color={t:HPColor}>{0} HP</color> and increases your <color={t:maxHPColor}>maximum HP</color> by <color={t:maxHPColor}>{1}</color>.

The empty vial can be reused.

This huge and rare egg is known for its vitalizing properties when its yolk is consumed raw.
Restores  <color={t:HPColor}>{0} HP</color> and increases your <color={t:maxHPColor}>maximum HP</color> by <color={t:maxHPColor}>{1}</color>.

The empty shell is valuable for alchemists.

A well-balanced battle axe.
Increases your <color={t:damageColor}>damage</color> by <color={t:damageColor}>{0}</color>.

This mystical wand shoots high-speed fireballs at your enemies.
Increases your <color={t:damageColor}>damage</color> by <color={t:damageColor}>{0}</color>.
A weighty bar of pure gold, a merchant would pay a good sum for it.
These rare eggshells are highly valued by alchemists.
